mnemonics: Eight hours of work, eight hours of play, eight hours of rest, to start the day
keyPoints: The 8-hour rule in convex optimization is based on the assumption that the objective function will be concave and the feasible region will be convex.
The 8-hour rule also implies that the optimization problem will have a finite number of solutions.
The 8-hour rule is often used in practice as a guideline for finding approximate solutions to convex optimization problems.
